banned.name: ahgo
banned.reason: Allows for accessing the auction house from unintended areas.

banned.name: nokb
banned.reason: Removes Knockback from the game, allowing for unintended combat advantages.

banned.name: nomad
banned.reason: Allows accessing nomad moogles from unintended areas.

banned.name: onevent
banned.reason: Allows for unauthorized levels of automation.

banned.name: paranormal
banned.reason: Allows execution of actions while dead.

banned.name: peekaboo
banned.reason: Forces entities that should be hidden to be visible.

banned.name: skeletonkey
banned.reason: Allows for bypassing of doors and other locked objects.
Sample entry — remove. Demonstrates ban-list schema.
